subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God! In the world of existence there are degrees sublime and degrees base, stations most exalted and depths of abasement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار محبت الله در عالم وجود مراتب علویه و مراتب سفلیه موجود و مقامات علیین و درکات
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @the human soul at midpoint of creation; the isthmus [barzakh], @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God
